description_long: This is a vintage, full-size SUV with a two-tone orange and white exterior, featuring a boxy body style typical of late 1970s to early 1980s American vehicles. The SUV has four passenger doors, large rectangular side windows, and a long roof with raised ridges and roof marker lights. The front end displays a wide chrome grille with dual headlights and a flat hood, while the rear is characterized by a large, nearly vertical tailgate and rectangular taillights. The wheels are classic steel rims with chrome hubcaps and blackwall tires, and the vehicle sits relatively high off the ground, suggesting off-road capability. The overall design is robust, with chrome trim along the sides and bumpers, and black window frames contrasting the bright paintwork.
description: A vintage orange and white SUV with a boxy design, chrome trim, and four doors, featuring classic steel wheels and a robust, high-riding stance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange and white two-tone paint, four doors, large windows, and chrome trim.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide tailgate, rectangular taillights, and the vehicle's boxy rear profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the four doors, chrome trim, and classic wheel design.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide chrome grille, dual headlights, flat hood, and roof marker lights.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke steel wheels with chrome hubcaps and blackwall tires
